productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Max Turbulence White Sports Shoes
description: Created to offer unparalleled cushioning and comfort, the nike Air Max Turbulance+ 16 running shoe is a versatile everyday trainer that responds to your every stride, Offering soft, plush cushioning and a comfortable ride, this shoe works wonders for runners with mildly underpronated and neutral gaits. It's classic design also makes it a fabulous everyday wear.This shoe is compatible with nike+ products, which you can add on to track your performance such as speed, calories burnt, distanced traversed and much more.UpperLightweight breathable mesh upper with a nearly seamless open toe box for comfort, width accommodation and abrasion-free comfortStrategically placed midfoot overlays that hug the inner arch and lock the foot in placeSynthetic leather overlays from heel to toe for a snug, secure Fit and added shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised fitHeavily meshed and padded tongue and collar for snug comfortFull meshed and padded inner bootie for a snug, comfort fit and plush interior feel that enhances performanceFitsole sockliner that comforms to the shape of the footReflective elements for safe use in low light conditionsMidsoleLow-pressure Nike Air unit in a running specific design in the heel and forefoot for easy compression, maximum impact protection and better medial supportMidsole foam pillars for enhanced structural support and stability, lending underfoot support and a more responsive, smooth rideOutsoleTPR outsole with flex grooves for enhanced flexibility and a smooth, efficient rideMixed rubbers in waffle pattern for enhanced durability, traction and a smooth sure-foot strideNike+ read unit Shoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
